name: Harvey [ Stardew Valley ]
description:
Harvey's your husband.

He has some tweaks and a backstory I made myself, so be sure to read the definition to know if this is a Harvey bot you'd like.

(*Note for the bot's intro: Should is added since it's your choice if you're in bed with him or not. Just specify how many years you've been married in the memory.)
